title: Blotiella javanica
taxonomy: Blotiella javanica is classified within the family Polypodiaceae, which is a group of ferns commonly known as the polypody ferns. This family is a part of the more extensive group known as Polypodiales, which are a suborder of ferns. The Polypodiales are further classified under the class Polypodiopsida and are one of the two major groups of ferns. The class Polypodiopsida is part of the division Pteridophyta, which encompasses all ferns. This division is then classified under the kingdom Plantae, encompassing all types of plants.
